entity.label: Beth-car
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Sheep-house, a place to which the Israelites pursued the Philistines west from Mizpeh (1 Sam. 7:11).

nodes.label: Beth-car
nodes.description: Sheep-house, a place to which the Israelites pursued the Philistines west from Mizpeh (1 Sam. 7:11).

verses.text: And the men of Israel went out of Mizpeh, and pursued the Philistines, and smote them, until they came under Bethcar.
